description: Perform a buffer analysis on the point data located at /home/ga/GIS_Data/sample_points.geojson. Create a 500-meter buffer around each point using 16 segments. Export the resulting buffer polygons as a GeoJSON file to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/point_buffers.geojson using the EPSG:4326 (WGS84) coordinate reference system.
